user_system_path: GitHub OS Enforcement Layer v2: make repo-law enforceable at PR time through forbidden-file checks, PR receipt validation, active-seam protection, structured intake, forbidden-claim grep, and doctrine lock.
allowed_files_raw: Issue #246 governance/enforcement files only: continuity gate, focused config tests, PR Sentinel and issue-template wiring, active source-truth files, contract, and the Hybrid Poster Landing doctrine paragraph.
forbidden_files_raw: No product code, dashboard/frontend visual changes, Slack/Supabase/Vercel/Stripe/auth, schema migrations, dependency upgrades, or broad cleanup.
required_local_proof: npm run gate:continuity && npx vitest run tests/config/__tests__/continuity-gate.test.ts --reporter=verbose && npm run lint && npm run build
acceptance_condition: Gates B-G are enforced by PR Sentinel / continuity gate and focused tests prove forbidden-file, receipt, active-seam, valid PR, and forbidden-claim behavior.
stop_condition: Stop only when #246 is merged and closed with GitHub receipts, or blocked with exact receipt.
anti_regression_checks: forbidden claim planted in public-facing copy fails
next_command: Finish #246 transaction through PR, CI, receipts, and merge or exact blocker.
